home.subtagline_zh: 德立新集团 – 构建企业智能现代化
home.hero_subtitle: DLX partners with operationally intensive companies to modernize workflows, reduce manual friction, and unlock efficiency through practical, AI-enabled process transformation.
home.mission_text: Empower organizations with AI-driven operational strategy and transformation that deliver real, measurable improvements.
home.vision_text: Help mid-sized companies modernize their software, data, and AI capabilities to operate at a world-class level.
home.strategic_text: We focus on solving real operational problems that directly affect cost, speed, accuracy, and scalability. Using modern AI tools and our structured Operational Intelligence Modernization Framework (OIMF), we:
home.strategic_2: Redesign workflows for clarity and speed
home.strategic_3: Integrate AI and automation where ROI is highest
home.strategic_4: Ensure solutions are adopted and sustained
home.value_prop_1_desc: Practical solutions to the operational challenges teams face every day.
home.value_prop_2_desc: We work alongside client teams to ensure alignment, adoption, and results.
home.value_prop_3_desc: Transforming outdated workflows into scalable, future-ready systems.
home.value_prop_4_desc: Every engagement ties to clear KPIs and operational improvements.
home.why_dlx_text: We combine operational depth, AI expertise, and execution discipline to help organizations operate smarter, faster, and more efficiently — with results that leadership can see and measure.
home.timeline: Total Duration: 8–13 weeks (dependent on client responsiveness)

about.title: About DLX Solution
about.subtitle: Design. Lead. Transform. | 德立新集团
about.intro: DLX partners with operationally intensive companies to modernize workflows, reduce manual friction, and unlock efficiency through practical, AI-enabled process transformation.
about.founder_role: Founder & CEO, DLX Solution | 德立新集团
about.founder_bio: Daisy Lee founded DLX Solution with a vision to connect innovative AI-driven operational solutions with businesses seeking measurable growth. Under her leadership, DLX has become a trusted partner for organizations navigating intelligent enterprise modernization.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Architecting Intelligent Enterprise Modernization
services.phase_1_items: End-to-end workflow mapping, bottleneck analysis, quantified inefficiency assessment, risk exposure mapping, executive opportunity report
services.phase_2_items: Target-state workflow design, AI & automation integration roadmap, ROI modeling, prioritized implementation plan
services.phase_3_items: Deployment of selected automations, KPI tracking dashboard, team enablement & training, measurable impact report
services.phase_4_items: Monthly KPI review, continuous improvement roadmap, expansion recommendations
